name: sgs/tab
title: SGS Tab
description: Individual tab panel — add any content blocks inside.

wrapper.label: Wrapper
wrapper._note: CONTENT-KIND composite mirror (SGS_Container_Wrapper 'content' kind) — no `layer` (this is the tab PANEL wrapper, a leaf, not a grid/section layer). block.json declares no `spacing`/`typography` supports on this block, so padding/margin/font-* are honest gaps.

innerBlocks.label: Tab content
innerBlocks._note: Content is native InnerBlocks children (any block type) — each child owns its own typography. Mirrors sgs/quote's quote-body element. The `label` attribute is NOT rendered anywhere in THIS block's own render.php — it is read only by the PARENT sgs/tabs to render the tab BUTTON text, and its styling (tabTextColour/tabActiveTextColour/tabActiveBgColour/tabActiveIndicatorColour/tabHoverBgColour) is owned entirely by sgs/tabs's own `tab` manifest element (see tabs/block.json) — never duplicated here.
